# COLEwebdev

> Cape Cod's full-service web design and development studio. Custom websites, WordPress, e-commerce, SEO, hosting, and AI integrations — built for small businesses and nonprofits since 2006.

COLEwebdev is a husband-and-wife web studio based in Eastham, Massachusetts, on Cape Cod. Founded in 2006 by Josiah and Desiree Cole, the studio has launched 700+ websites for small businesses, nonprofits, and community organizations across the Outer Cape and beyond. Every project goes through Josiah and Desiree directly — no account managers, no outsourcing.

Phone: 508-413-2043
Email: info@colewebdev.com
Location: Eastham, MA 02642 (serving all of Cape Cod)
Google rating: 5★ (70+ reviews)

## Services

- [Website Design + Build](https://colewebdev.org/website-design.html): 100% custom design and development, no templates. Fixed price, end-to-end.
- [WordPress Websites](https://colewebdev.org/wordpress.html): Custom WordPress themes, lean plugin stack, client-managed content.
- [Traditional Web Design](https://colewebdev.org/traditional.html): Hand-coded HTML/CSS/JS — maximum performance, zero CMS overhead.
- [E-Commerce](https://colewebdev.org/ecommerce.html): WooCommerce and Shopify storefronts built to convert.
- [SEO & Local Search](https://colewebdev.org/seo.html): Local SEO, Google Ads, and search strategy for Cape Cod businesses.
- [Website Hosting + Care Plans](https://colewebdev.org/hosting.html): Managed WordPress hosting with daily backups, SSL, and human support.
- [Branding](https://colewebdev.org/branding.html): Logo, color, print — brand identity that works across every surface.
- [AI Studio](https://colewebdev.org/ai-apps.html): Booking, intake, and search powered by AI, integrated into existing sites.
- [All Services](https://colewebdev.org/services.html): Full overview of all services.

## Portfolio

- [Portfolio](https://colewebdev.org/portfolio.html): 32 featured projects across industries including hospitality, nonprofit, retail, healthcare, and community organizations on Cape Cod.

## Resources

- [Whitepapers](https://colewebdev.org/whitepapers.html): Eight in-depth guides on web design strategy — What Web Design Does, Investment Value, DIY vs Pro, 3 Types of Web Design, 7 Golden Rules, 5 Essential Principles, The 7 C's Framework, Building a Better FAQ.
- [News](https://colewebdev.org/news.html): Recent website launches, industry news, and resources for Cape Cod business owners.

## Company

- [About Us](https://colewebdev.org/about.html): Studio story, team bios for Josiah and Desiree Cole, awards, and community memberships.
- [Our Process](https://colewebdev.org/process.html): How COLEwebdev scopes, designs, builds, launches, and hands off every project.
- [Contact](https://colewebdev.org/contact.html): Start a project, request a quote, or schedule a free first-hour consultation.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2006
- Location: Eastham, MA (Cape Cod)
- Founders: Josiah Cole (CTO/Webmaster) and Desiree Cole (CEO/Web Diva)
- Projects launched: 700+
- Specialties: Cape Cod small businesses, nonprofits, seasonal businesses, hospitality
- Technologies: WordPress, WooCommerce, Shopify, HTML/CSS/JS, AI integrations
- First consultation: Free (no commitment)
